summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Crypto Walking with Christ PWA. Core TIV-TEK verification system working correctly with proper timing mechanics. UI loads properly with all required elements. Minor issues with verification slide gesture detection and Supabase error handling.

ui_bugs.issue: Slide gesture during 10-second verification window not being detected properly
ui_bugs.details: The slide gesture works to start sessions but fails to register during the verification window. May need gesture detection refinement or different event handling.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 406 errors and 'body stream already read' errors when fetching ledger data
integration_issues.details: Supabase API connection works (returns 200), but client-side error handling needs improvement. App functions with default values.

passed_tests: Audio player screen loads correctly with Scripture Day badge on weekdays
Slide-to-walk button starts session successfully (timer increments from 00:00:00)
20-second countdown appears after session starts and counts down properly
10-second verification window opens with 'SLIDE NOW!' message and visual feedback
Ledger toggle expands to show Three Pillars (Verification: 0, Samaritan: 0, Sabbath: 0)
Session timer increments while playing (tested up to 00:00:21)
Supabase connection works (API returns 200, empty array indicates no data yet)
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Mobile-responsive design works correctly on 390x844 viewport
Day mode detection works (shows weekday Scripture Day badge)
Visual feedback during verification (red pulsing button, border animation)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix verification slide gesture detection during the 10-second verification window. The gesture works for starting sessions but fails during verification. Also improve Supabase error handling to prevent console 406 errors when no data exists.
